metadata.disclaimer: Prototype research product; not for operational aviation decision-making.

MUF3000.description: maximum useable frequency of the F2 layer for 3000 km circuit

foF2.description: critical frequency of the F2 layer

hmF2.description: altitude of the F2 layer peak density

NmF2.description: peak density of the F2 layer

MUF3000_depression.description: Positive fractional decrease in MUF3000 from AIDA background state.

foF2_depression.description: Positive fractional decrease in foF2 from AIDA background state.

gnss.rationale: Prototype GNSS risk derived from global vertical TEC thresholding.

hf_com.rationale: Prototype HF COM risk derived from depression relative to AIDA background.

radiation.rationale: Radiation risk is not calculated from the AIDA ionospheric model.
